for those who move the world.
hero.sub: Physiotherapy, Osteopathy and Clinical Pilates in Panoias, Braga. Dr. Cláudia Alves and a team dedicated to giving you back your movement.
hero.badge.title: Specialists
about.label: About the Clinic
about.title:
Two decades.
One mission.
about.p1: FisioVitae was founded by Dr. Cláudia Alves with a simple conviction: good treatment is one that sees the person, not just the symptom.
about.p2: Over 20 years in Panoias, we have become a regional reference — not by chance, but because every patient is treated with clinical rigour and human closeness. Our multidisciplinary team works together to ensure each treatment plan is genuinely tailored to you.
about.caption: "Every body tells a different story."
svc.label: Our Services
svc.title: Specialised treatments.
svc.intro: Cutting-edge techniques combined with a human, personalised approach. Every treatment is designed for you.
svc.card.physio: Individual assessment and treatment of pain, injury and dysfunction — for children and adults.
svc.card.osteo: Manual techniques to restore the body's balance — structural, paediatric, visceral and more.
svc.card.massage: Manual therapies to release tension, recover and restore balance to body and mind.
svc.card.holistic: Therapies to rebalance body and mind — with techniques refined over centuries of practice.
svc.card.aesthetic: Personalised treatments to enhance your natural beauty and wellbeing — with clinical rigour.
why.label: Why FisioVitae
why.title: What sets us apart.
why.intro: We're not just another clinic. We're specialists with 20 years of proven results — and a team that knows you by name.
why.quote: "Physiotherapy only works when there is mutual trust. We've built that trust over 20 years, patient by patient."
why.item.trust_desc: Two decades of results in the Braga community. Our reputation was built patient by patient, with no shortcuts.
why.item.tech_desc: Percutaneous and ultrasound-guided — approaches most clinics in the region still don't offer.
why.item.team_desc: Physiotherapy, osteopathy and pilates under the same roof. An integrated approach for more complete results.
why.item.warm_desc: You're always greeted by name. A clinic where care goes beyond treatment.
why.item.plan_desc: No two treatments are the same. We assess, plan and adjust to your condition and lifestyle.
why.item.park_desc: Easy access and free parking nearby — no stress before your appointment.
team.label: Our Team
team.title: The people who will care for you.
team.claudia_quote: "I believe every patient has a unique story that deserves to be heard with attention before being treated with technique."
team.ines_quote: "Rehabilitation is a partnership. My job is to guide — your effort is what transforms the results."
team.jose_quote: "Clinical Pilates isn't exercise — it's the bridge between recovery and the prevention of new injuries."

gallery.title:
Inside
the clinic.
gallery.intro: Spaces designed for comfort, state-of-the-art equipment and a team that pays attention to every detail — because recovery starts with the environment.
gallery.quote: "We don't treat the symptom. We treat the person carrying it."
cta.label: Ready to start?
cta.title:
Take the first step.
Recovery starts today.
cta.text: Our team is ready to welcome you and design a plan tailored to you. Book now — easy and hassle-free.
faq.label: Frequently Asked
faq.title: Frequently asked questions.
faq.intro: We've answered the most common questions. Something else? Contact us.
faq.q1: Do I need a medical referral?
faq.a1: It's not required. If you have imaging (MRI, ultrasound) or a medical referral, please bring it — it helps us personalise your treatment plan from the start.
faq.q2: How many sessions are usually needed?
faq.a2: It depends on the condition. Acute injuries can resolve in 4–8 sessions; chronic conditions require longer follow-up. At the first consultation we always set a realistic and honest plan.
faq.q3: Is Clinical Pilates different from regular Pilates?
faq.a3: Yes, significantly. It's supervised by a healthcare professional, with exercises prescribed specifically for your condition — it's not a generic group class. It's rehabilitation and prevention.
faq.a4: Most patients describe just a gentle pressure sensation. We use very fine needles with patient comfort as a priority. Some mild local tenderness over the next 24–48h is normal.
faq.a5: Yes, there's free parking near Rua Nova de Agrafonte. If you have difficulty, give us a call and we'll guide you straight away.
faq.q6: Do you treat children and babies?
faq.a6: Yes. Paediatric osteopathy lets us treat newborns, babies and children through adolescence. The techniques are fully adapted and gentle — parents are always welcome in the room.
